description: Universal-core string predicates — PASSING surface (§55.1). length(>=2) on "Ada" and pattern(/…/) on "a@b" both pass: each field isValid true, errors empty, and the compound rollup isValid true.
rationale: §55.6 a satisfied validator yields an empty errors array and isValid true; §55.5 the compound rollup is true once every field passes. Proves the valid direction of length + pattern.
